title: Sourcing & Quotation Analyst
description:
Role Summary
We are hiring a Sourcing & Quotation Analyst to join our remote team. This is a night shift role. Your shift starts at 5:00 PM Kabul time and runs for 8 hours, aligned with international business hours.
Your day will revolve around three things: finding the right opportunities, sourcing the right items from the right vendors, and building clean quotations that win. You will spend most of your shift on calls and emails with international vendors, so strong English and confidence on the phone are non-negotiable.
This role is for someone serious. Someone who wants to grow, works hard without being chased, and takes pride in getting the details right. If you are looking for a relaxed 9 to 5, this is not for you. If you want to build a real career and you are willing to put in the work, we want to talk to you.

Duties and Responsibilities
Opportunity Research
Search online portals and platforms for new tenders, RFQs, and product opportunities.
Read the requirements carefully and understand exactly what is being asked for.
Shortlist the opportunities that fit and flag them to management.
Item Sourcing
Identify the correct manufacturers and authorized distributors for each item.
Verify part numbers, specifications, and compliance requirements before reaching out.
Find backup vendors for every key item so we are never stuck with a single source.
Vendor Communication
Call and email vendors during your shift to request quotes, confirm stock, lead times, and shipping terms.
Ask sharp follow-up questions when a quote is incomplete or unclear.
Follow up consistently until you have everything you need. No half-finished work.
Quotation Preparation
Organize vendor pricing in Excel or Google Sheets and compare properly.
Build professional quotations using company templates.
Triple check every number, SKU, quantity, and date before anything goes out.
Coordination and Records
Keep clean records of all vendor communication, quotes, and follow-ups.
Update internal trackers and CRM tools daily.
Work closely with management on final pricing and submission strategy.
Never miss a deadline.
Discipline and Work Ethic
Log in on time. Every shift.
Respond quickly on email, WhatsApp, and internal tools during your hours.
Keep a professional tone in every vendor interaction.
Own your work. No excuses, no shortcuts.

Job Requirements
Must-Have
Fluent English. Spoken and written. You must be able to hold a clear, confident conversation on the phone with international vendors. This is not negotiable.
Strong IT background. Comfortable with advanced Google search, Excel or Google Sheets (formulas, filters, sorting), email tools, cloud storage, and basic CRM systems.
Sharp critical thinking. You can read a requirement, understand what is being asked, and spot gaps or risks in a vendor's quote.
Night shift availability. Ready to work 5:00 PM to 1:00 AM Kabul time, Monday to Friday, without exception.
Serious attention to detail. Numbers, SKUs, quantities, and dates must always be right.
Discipline and work ethic. Self-driven, reliable, consistent. You do not need someone standing over you to get the work done.
Confident on calls. Polite, professional, clear. No slang, no shortcuts.
Hungry. You want to build something real and you are willing to put in the work to get there.
Nice-to-Have
Previous experience in procurement, sourcing, or supply chain.
Exposure to international tenders or B2B quotation work.
Experience with tender portals or sourcing platforms.
Familiarity with Notion, ClickUp, Trello, or similar project management tools.
Basic knowledge of IT hardware, industrial equipment, or logistics.
Do Not Apply If
You are looking for a 9 to 5.
You cannot commit to the night shift.
You need to be chased to finish work.
Your English is weak and you plan to fake it on vendor calls. You cannot.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates should submit their updated CV along with a short introduction (2 to 3 paragraphs) explaining why they are a good fit for this role and confirming their availability for the night shift (5:00 PM to 1:00 AM Kabul time).
Send applications to: procurement@vastglobelogistics.com
Please write "Sourcing & Quotation Analyst Application" in the email subject line.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Applications without a proper introduction will not be considered.

details.Functional Area: Procurement and logistics, Information Technology, Business Development, Sales, Supply Chain Management

title: عضو ویسترن یونین + IT شهری څانګه / نماینده ګی ولایتی
description:
Role Summary
اجراء / طی مراحل نمودن حواله جات ویسترن یونین در مطابقت کامل با SOP - Strandard Operating Procedure ، اخذ Back Up از کمره های امنیتی و رسیده گی به چالش های تخنیکی / نتورک در داخل نماینده گی

Duties and Responsibilities
اجراء و طی مراحل حواله جات وارده / صادره در مطابقت کامل با SOP مرتبه از جانب کمپنی ویسترن یونین
رعایت کامل دساتیر / رهنمود / پروسیجر های مرتبه از جانب کمپنی ویسترن یونین
حفظ و محرمیت توکن و پاسورد شبکۀ مخابراتی ویسترن یونین
طی مراحل سریع و بموقع حواله جات وارده / صادره
حفظ و نگهداشت اسناد و سوابق حواله جات ویسترن یونین و فایلنگ منظم و مرتب
دقت در انجام معاملات ، انجام حواله جات به پول افغانی / دالر در مطابقت کامل با فرمایش مشتریان / مراجعین
جلوگیری از مغالطه ها در اسم مشتری / انتخاب کشور گیرندۀ پول حین ارسال حواله جات ویسترن یونین
برخورد نیک و حسنه با مشتریان / مراجعین ویسترن یونین
اشتراک فعال در چلسات هماهنگی که از جانب مدیر / معاون برگزار میگردد
کار گروپی " Team Working" جهت نایل شدن به اهداف / تارگیت تعین شده
ایجاد شیر فولدر در کمپیوتر ها، نصب و اشتراک‌گذاری پرینتر و نصب و حذف برنامه‌ها ، تنظیم تاریخ و زمان در سیستم ، افزودن زبان (Language) ، فعال بودن آنتی‌ویروس در تمام کمپیوترها ، اعیار و تنظیم سیستم CBS ، تنظیم، بک اپ و ضبط سیستم های CCTV
داشتن معلومات لازم پیرامون روتر (Router) ، سوئیچ (Switch) ، ساخت کیبل شبکه (RJ45) ، اتصال کمپیوترها به شبکه ، یافتن آدرس IP و آدرس MAC و حفظ ان
انجام سایرامورات محوله قانونی به هدایت آمر مستقیم

Job Requirements
1 درجه تحصیل : لیسانس دررشته کمپیوتر ساینس و اقتصاد. به رشته کمپیوتر ساینس ترجیح داده میشود
2 تجربه کاری : 1 سال در بخش های مربوط به Hardware & Software
مهارت های لازم :
1 بلدیت به لسان های رسمی (پشتو و دری) و خارجی : ( حداقل انگلیسی)
2 آگاهی از قوانین ومقررات ویسترن یونین و بلدیت با سیستم تکنالوژی معلوماتی
3 بلدیت با برنامه های مورد ضرورت کمپیوتر.( آفیس ...) و مسایل مربوط به آی تی
لایحه وظایف خویش را بطور دقیق مطالعه نموده و با درنظرداشت آن اجراآت می نمایم.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates are requested to submit their application (CV with the Education Document and Tazkira Scan in one PDF format) to the Human Resources Department, Pashtany Bank.
To apply, please Click On Apply Now!
Only complete applications will be accepted, and short-listed candidates will be contacted to interview

title: Finance Assistant
description:
Role Summary
The Finance Assistant will be responsible for assisting with financial transactions, budgeting, and financial reporting. This role involves maintaining accurate financial records, conducting financial analysis, and ensuring compliance with relevant financial regulations. Additionally, the Finance Assistant will collaborate with line manager to develop and monitor budgets, prepare financial reports, and contribute to the overall financial well-being of the foundation.
Proficiency in utilizing financial applications, strong attention to detail, analytical skills, and ability to work collaboratively is the key requirements for this role.

Duties and Responsibilities
Assisting the Finance and Logistics Manager in handling the financial affairs of the Foundation
Entering the income and daily expenses in the Foundation’s financial system
Scanning all the financial documents of the Foundation
Contribution in preparation of the monthly allowance distributions
Cooperation with the Social Care Department in distributing of the Monthly Allowances and in-kind aids to the registered orphaned families
Assisting the Finance and Logistics Manager in preparing financial reports
Preparing the employees’ payrolls according to the attendance reports received from Admin/HR Department
Dealing with the daily expenses of the office under the supervision of the Line Manager
Any other tasks assigned by the Line Manager

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree preferably in finance and accounting
At least two years of experience in financial fields
Ability to work under pressure
Computer skills especially with QuickBooks and MS Office packages
Fluency in English and Dari both written and spoken
High skills in planning and reporting

Submission Guidelines
Please submit your CV to hr@alayn.af
Deadline for applications: 26/April/2026
Please mention the position title and reference number in the subject line of your email; otherwise, your application will not be evaluated.
Please note that only shortlisted applicants will be contacted. If you do not hear from us, your application has not been successful.

details.Functional Area: Procurement and logistics, Data Entry, Financial Reporting, Finance

title: Marketing Agent
description:
Role Summary
Position Title: Marketing Agent
Organization: Alhawa Group / Alhawa Technologies
Duty Station: Kabul
Type of Contract: Commission-Based / Flexible Field Engagement
Number of Positions: 10
Application Deadline: May 1, 2026
Purpose of the Position
The Marketing Agent will support the promotion and sale of Alhawa’s software systems and services by identifying potential clients, introducing products, conducting basic system demonstrations, maintaining client follow-up, and coordinating with the company’s management team to support deal closure.
Products and Services to be Promoted
The selected candidates will support the promotion our existing systems and solutions

Duties and Responsibilities
Key Responsibilities
The Marketing Agent will be responsible for:
Identifying and approaching potential clients in Kabul and related markets
Introducing the company and its systems in a professional manner
Understanding the client’s current workflow and operational needs
Conducting basic product introductions and demonstrations
Following up with interested clients and maintaining communication
Reporting client requirements and custom requests to the office
Coordinating with the Marketing Manager and relevant internal teams
Supporting the movement of opportunities from first contact to quotation and closure stage
Maintaining proper records of leads, visits, meetings, demos, and follow-up actions
Representing the company in a disciplined and professional way

Job Requirements
Required Qualifications
Applicants should have:
· Must be at least studying in Computer Science or be a graduate of Computer Science or a closely related field
Strong communication and interpersonal skills
Ability to confidently engage with clients and decision-makers
Basic technical understanding of systems and software
Basic laptop, email, and internet skills
Ability to work in the field and maintain active follow-up
Interest in sales, marketing, and client relationship-building
Ability to explain products in a simple and understandable way
Fluency in local languages
Preferred Qualifications
Preference will be given to applicants with:
Previous experience in sales or marketing
Experience in field-based commercial work
Exposure to software, telecom, office systems, devices, or technical products
Existing market access or business contacts in Kabul
Fresh applicants with strong communication skills, confidence, and willingness to learn are also encouraged to apply.
Nature of the Role
This is a flexible, field-based role. Marketing Agents are not required to remain in the office daily; however, they are expected to actively work in the market, maintain follow-up with prospects, and regularly report their activities and progress.
Compensation and Benefits
Selected candidates will receive:
AFN 3,000 monthly activity allowance , subject to verified field activity and reporting
10% commission on successful collected sales with the maximum cap of 3,000 USD per month.
Practical training on products and sales process
Opportunity to work with a growing local technology company
Flexible working arrangement
Performance-based growth opportunity

Submission Guidelines
Follo the link and enter you are details

title: Specialist IT Security
description:
Role Summary
Specialist IT Security with Etisalat Afghanistan.

Duties and Responsibilities
• Monitor and analyze network traffic, system activities, and security events to detect potential intrusions, attacks, or vulnerabilities.
• Respond to, investigate, and remediate security incidents, ensuring timely resolution and proper escalation where required.
• Perform regular risk assessments, vulnerability assessments, and security audits to identify and mitigate potential risks.
• Conduct penetration testing and security validation exercises to proactively identify weaknesses in systems, applications, and network infrastructure.
• Prepare detailed incident reports, root cause analyses, and recommendations for continuous improvement.
• Manage, maintain, and troubleshoot security infrastructure, including firewalls, VPN (SSL/IPsec), encryption systems, DMZ environments, and endpoint protection solutions.
• Monitor endpoints using EDR and NDR solutions to detect, analyze, and respond to advanced threats.
• Utilize SIEM & SOAR platforms for log monitoring, correlation, and threat detection.
• Monitor and secure Active Directory and identity systems using relevant security tools.
• Administer and support security solutions such as NAC, PAM, and IAM, including daily operations and troubleshooting.
• Integrate network devices and servers (Linux/Windows) with SIEM and other centralized security platforms.
• Collaborate with internal teams and attend technical sessions to ensure alignment of security operations and initiatives.
• Support the implementation and follow-up of cybersecurity projects and initiatives across the organization.
• Promote security awareness by guiding and training staff on cybersecurity best practices.
• Stay updated with the latest cybersecurity threats, vulnerabilities, and technologies to enhance the organization’s security posture.
• Perform any additional tasks assigned by management in line with organizational objectives.

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology or a related field, with at least four years of relevant experience preferred.

Submission Guidelines
To apply for this vacancy, please use the following link: https://careers.etisalat.af/
Kindly use Google Chrome Browser for smooth access.
For further information, please contact us via WhatsApp at +93 (0) 788 887 363.

title: Help Desk Engineer
description:
Role Summary
Help desk engineer provides technical support and assistance, whether on the phone, in person, or remotely, related to IP network. A help desk engineer responds to customer queries to provide technical assistance, follow up with related technical teams till resolving the customer issues.

Duties and Responsibilities
· Serve as the first point of contact for customers seeking technical assistance over the remote access, phone and email.
· Assisting customer in install and configure network devices (switches, routers, wireless routers, access points) when the customer need support.
· Pass on any feedback or suggestions by customers to the related AFTEL internal team.
· Troubleshoot system and network problems, diagnosing and solving hardware or software faults.
· Properly document all customer complaint, interactions and troubleshooting actions into the daily report.
· Install, monitor and maintain computer systems and networks.
· Utilize the department’s knowledge base to determine proper troubleshooting course of action.
· Attend meetings when required.
· Implementation of any other tasks assign by line manager.
· Follow up with customers and relative local teams to ensure issues are resolved.
· Ability to work in a 24/7 shift environment and coordinate effectively with multiple teams.

Job Requirements
Bachelor of Computer Science, or information technology, with 3 years’ relevant experience, in the Help Desk, IT-NOC, and relevant departments.
Skills Required:
• Having official CCNA is must and CCNP is preferred
• Having skills in computer programs (Ms. Office).
• Good speaking and writing skills in English, Dari, and Pashto.
• Good knowledge of IP Networks, optical fiber transmission.
• Ability to work under pressure, without administrative support.
• Ability to undertake a variety of tasks within the same time frame.
• Good skill in diagnosing and analyzing network problems.
• Familiar with the telecom network elements.

Submission Guidelines
متقاضیان میتوانند cv یا خلص صوانح شانرا به ایمیل آدرس های hr@afghantelecom.af با ذکر نمبر بست (Help disk-001) و عنوان بست درموضوع ایمیل ارسال نمایند. متقاضیانیکه درخواستی خویش را بعد از تاریخ اعلان بست ارسال مینمایند و یا هم شرایط مندرج این بست را تکمیل ننمایند شامل پروسه امتحان تحریری و مصاحبه نمیگردند.

title: Financing Administrator
description:
Role Summary
The financing administrator will be responsible for the daily administration of all loan into the systems (Abacus). After the marketing and loan confirmation from loan officers, the entire customer will be directed to the loan administrator, who will start punching the data directly into the system after interviewing the customer. Furthermore, he will be responsible for loan files and title deeds management in the branch.

Duties and Responsibilities
Data entry and reports extraction:
The financing administrator will be responsible for checking the client file and reconciling it with a checklist.
The financing administrator will be responsible for checking the sequence of the documents and uploading them into the system (ABACUS) accordingly.
The financing administrator will be responsible for uploading the invoice/bill into the system after financing the client.
The financing administrator will be responsible for the correctness of the documents, recording them into the database and keeping them in a file room,
The financing administrator will be responsible for adding all the new loan applications to the system.
The financing administrator will be responsible for changing any information in the system.
The financing administrator will be responsible for reviewing all the required documents and preparing the customer file well before the committee.
The financing administrator will be responsible for printing all relevant documents mandatory for the loan committee.
The financing administrator will be responsible for generating all the daily operation reports for loan officers, risk officers, credit managers, and branch managers.
The financing administrator will be responsible for providing the data if required by the Head office operations team.
The financing administrator will be responsible to receive and process the customer’s requests related to printing and sharing information.
The financing administrator will also be responsible for initial loan application approvals in the system.
The financing administrator will be responsible for adding the customer monitoring information received from loan officers only.
The financing administrator will be responsible for sending the special request and getting approval from HQ on processes like back-date transactions, penalty waive-offs, and interest rate changes.
The financing administrator will be responsible for making sure that the loan products are disbursed to the client in accordance with credit policy.
Loan administrator will be responsible to report Head of Operations in case of any discrepancies found in loan issues and repayments.
Documents management:
Loan filing management.
· Keeping the all-loan files of the clients properly in file room safely manner.
· Keeping the pictures of Branch level credit committee members.
· Keeping the file in chronological order.
· Regular check the completeness of the file.
Title deeds safeguard and management.
· Keeping the tile deeds of all clients in file.
· Regularly check availably of Tite deeds.
Loan contracts management.
· Keep all contract file safely in his custody.
Others:
Acting as a cashier in the absence of a cashier.
Facilitating the implementation of other technologies including but not limited to biometrics and GPS.
Any other task assigned by the branch manager.

Job Requirements
Afghan citizen;
b) Minimum High School diploma (any country);
c) Experience handling cash (business or household), experience with a Microfinance Institution preferable;
d) Fluent in Dari and English welcome but not essential
e) Computer skills in Word and/or Excel;
f) Strong organizational and interpersonal skills;
g) Able to work independently and in a group,
h) willing to take initiative, and energetic;
I) Able to learn quickly.

Submission Guidelines
Submission Guideline
The application, consist of a one-page cover letter explaining your interest and suitability for the post along with up-to-date CV, should be sent via email (clearly indicating on the subject line the title of the position and Vacancy Announcement Number) before closing date to the given email address.
Or submit hard copy at:
Submit your CV along with a cover letter to House # 600, Street # 6, Qala-e-Fatullah, District 10, Kabul, OXUS, Afghanistan.
Only short-listed candidates will be notified.
No phone calls will be entertained.
Submission Email
Jobs@oxusaf.org
Company: OXUS Afghanistan
Location: Multi Location

details.Functional Area: Administrative, Data Entry, Accounting, Archive Management

title: Data Entry & Data Analyst
description:
Role Summary
Night-Shift Job
Are you a motivated, detail-oriented professional fluent in English, and ready to grow in a dynamic environment? Speenkai, Afghanistan's first BPO service company, and Bay Master Appliance Services LLC are looking to hire experienced individuals to join our full-time night shift team as Data Entry & Data Analyst.
In this role, you will enter, update, and maintain data in company systems and databases. The ideal candidate will take charge of daily data operations, including planning and organizing tasks efficiently. You will review data for errors, inconsistencies, and completeness, ensuring accuracy at all times. Additionally, you will generate reports, maintain proper records, and support the team by providing reliable and timely data. Strong attention to detail, organizational skills, and the ability to work independently are essential for success in this role.
This position requires experience in data entry and data analysis, please apply only if you meet these requirements.
If you have strong communication skills, thrive under pressure, and are passionate about delivering exceptional support, we want to hear from you!

Duties and Responsibilities
Duties & Responsibilities
• Accurately enter, update, and maintain data in company systems and databases
• Review data for errors, inconsistencies, and completeness
• Perform data cleaning and validation to ensure accuracy
• Analyze data and generate reports for management
• Prepare summaries, dashboards, and insights based on collected data
• Maintain confidentiality and security of sensitive information
• Coordinate with different departments to collect and verify data
• Ensure timely completion of assigned tasks and reports

Job Requirements
Job Requirements
• Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, IT, Statistics, or related field (preferred)
• Proven experience in data entry and/or data analysis
• Strong knowledge of Microsoft Excel (formulas, pivot tables, VLOOKUP, etc.)
• Experience with data analysis tools (Power BI, Tableau, or similar is a plus)
• Excellent attention to detail and accuracy
• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
• Good communication and organizational skills
Preferred Skills
• Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines
• Familiarity with database systems and CRM tools
• Basic knowledge of accounting or business data is an advantage

Submission Guidelines
Please open the application form using the link below and complete all required fields, including uploading your updated CV, voice, and any certificates:
🔗 https://bmapplianceservice.com/apply3
We appreciate your interest in joining our company and look forward to reviewing your application.

details.Functional Area: Administrative, Communication, Data Collection, Data Entry, Management

title: Country IT & Business Solutions Officer
description:
Role Summary
The IT & Business Solutions Officer (Officer) is responsible for overseeing and managing all aspects of IT operations in a country where Women for Women International operates. This role requires a strong technical background, excellent communication skills, and the ability to work independently while collaborating with cross-functional teams. The Officer will ensure the smooth functioning of all IT systems, infrastructure, and services in the country, aligning them with the overall Global IT strategy and organizational objectives. Additionally, the Officer will play a crucial role in improving business processes, increasing efficiencies, providing regular applications and information security training, successfully implementing initiatives directed from the Global IT team, leading both local and global projects, contributing to the advancement of Global IT's annual plans, and ensuring compliance with GDPR regulations and any other applicable laws in the country.

Duties and Responsibilities
Engagement
Internal Relations
Collaborate closely with the Admin Coordinator and Global IT team to align country-level IT operations with organizational strategies.
Serve as the primary IT focal point for all departments within the Afghanistan Country Office, ensuring smooth communication and coordination.
Work cross-functionally with Program, Finance, Administration, and Operations teams to identify business process improvements and technology-driven efficiencies.
Provide IT advice and guidance to senior leadership and staff, fostering a culture of digital literacy and security awareness.
External Relations
Manage relationships with local IT vendors, service providers, and consultants, ensuring compliance with organizational standards and service-level agreements.
Liaise with internet service providers, equipment suppliers, and external technical support as required.
Delivery
IT Infrastructure Management : Manage and maintain the IT infrastructure in the country, including network devices, storage systems, and telecommunications equipment. Ensure that the infrastructure is secure, scalable, and optimized for efficient operations.
Systems Administration : Administer and support the country office's computer systems, including operating systems, software applications, and user accounts following the standards and procedures set by Global IT. Monitor system performance, troubleshoot issues, and implement necessary upgrades or patches.
Technical/Helpdesk Support : Provide technical support and assistance to end-users in the country, addressing hardware and software problems, network connectivity issues, and other IT-related queries. Resolve support requests in a timely manner to minimize downtime and disruptions and escalate requests to Global IT promptly when needed. Utilize Global IT's ticketing system to track and manage support requests, ensuring efficient communication and documentation.
Network and Connectivity : Manage the local network infrastructure, including routers, switches, firewalls, and wireless access points. Ensure reliable connectivity within the office and to the Internet, implementing necessary security measures to protect data and systems.
IT Security and Training : Implement and enforce IT security policies and procedures in accordance with the organization's standards. Regularly assess and monitor the country office's IT security posture, identifying vulnerabilities and recommending appropriate measures to mitigate risks. Conduct regular applications and information security training for all users, with a specific focus on data protection and maximizing the use of available systems.
IT Procurement and Vendor Management: Collaborate with the Global IT team and local stakeholders to identify IT needs and procure necessary hardware, software, and services for the country. Manage vendor relationships and contracts, ensuring compliance with service level agreements.
Business Process Improvement: Work closely with other teams in the country office to identify areas for process improvement and increased efficiency. Collaborate with stakeholders to understand business requirements and provide IT solutions that streamline operations. Act as a consultant and advisor on IT-related matters, helping teams successfully implement new initiatives directed by the Global IT team. Lead both local and global projects and contribute to the advancement of Global IT's annual plans.
Backup and Disaster Recovery: Ensure information across devices and systems is properly backed up. Develop and maintain a country’s disaster recovery plan to ensure business continuity in various crisis scenarios. Regularly test and validate these plans' effectiveness, making necessary improvements to ensure business continuity in case of disruptions or outages.
Documentation and Reporting: Create and maintain comprehensive documentation of IT systems and assets, processes, and configurations in the country office. Prepare regular reports on IT operations, including performance metrics, incident trends, and project updates for monthly management review. Utilize Global IT's knowledge management system to document changes and create help materials for users.
Compliance with GDPR and Applicable Laws : Ensure compliance with GDPR regulations and any other applicable data protection laws in the country. Implement measures to safeguard personal data and privacy rights. Conduct regular audits and assessments to verify compliance and provide reports to the appropriate stakeholders.
Business Process Improvement: Work closely with other teams in the country office to identify areas for process improvement and increased efficiency. Collaborate with stakeholders to understand business requirements and provide IT solutions that streamline operations. Act as a consultant and advisor on IT-related matters, helping teams successfully implement new initiatives directed by the Global IT team. Lead both local and global projects and contribute to the advancement of Global IT's annual plans.

Job Requirements
Job Requirements:
Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field.
Proven experience in IT operations, infrastructure management, and technical support (3+ years preferred).
Strong knowledge of networking principles, systems administration, and IT security.
Familiarity with relevant technologies, such as Windows/Mac, Android and iOS operating systems, virtualization, cloud services, and enterprise applications.
Certifications in relevant areas (e.g., CCNA, Meraki, MCSA, ITIL) are a plus.
Ability to work independently and collaboratively as part of a team.
Fluent written and verbal Dari, Pashto language skills; please expect written fluency testing.
Fluent written and verbal English language skills
Willing and able to travel to sub-offices as needed as well as travel internationally.
Demonstrated ability to take decisions proactively , work autonomously, and solicit team and leadership support when appropriate.
Attention to details, Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, strong use of logic and creativity .
Impeccable integrity.
Demonstrated ability to navigate Afghanistan’s laws and regulations, and to effectively, respectfully , responsibly, and ethically manage contextual and extraordinary complexities.
Meticulous organizational and time-management skills; able to prioritize and manage order of operations within multiple projects, directing and maximizing team inputs while: proactively supporting team wellbeing.
Committed to progress in the workplace, including progress in equity for all , diversity, inclusion, and belonging.
Working Conditions:
This position typically operates in an office environment.
Occasional overtime may be required to meet deadlines or complete projects.

Submission Guidelines
Please clearly mention the Job Title and Vacancy Number in the subject line of your email.
We appreciate your interest in joining our team.

title: ‌Business Development Assistant
description:
Role Summary
The Business Development Assistant supports the Business Development Department in identifying new business opportunities, preparing proposals, maintaining client relations, conducting market research, and coordinating project documentation.
This role ensures that all BD-related activities are properly tracked, reported, and aligned with the company’s strategic objectives.

Duties and Responsibilities
Business Development Assistant will work under the overall guidance of the department Head.
He/she will fulfill the following duties and responsibilities:
Business Support & Coordination:
Assist in preparing business proposals, quotations, and presentations for clients.
Maintain a systematic record of all business opportunities, meetings, and client interactions.
Coordinate with other departments (Technical, Finance, HR, and Operations) to collect inputs for proposals and project plans.
Support in the organization of business meetings, workshops, and client visits.
Research & Analysis:
Conduct market and competitor research to identify new business prospects, potential clients, and partnership opportunities.

title: IT Manager
description:
Role Summary
AurumPay is seeking an experienced and hands-on IT Manager to lead and manage our core technical infrastructure. As a licensed Electronic Money Institution (EMI), this role is critical in ensuring 99.99% uptime , security, and regulatory compliance of our digital wallet platform.
The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in Oracle Solaris environments and Sophos security infrastructure , and will act as a bridge between development, security, and operations teams to ensure systems are secure, scalable, and audit-ready.

Duties and Responsibilities
Key Responsibilities
1. Server Infrastructure (Oracle Solaris & Enterprise Systems)
Lead the installation, configuration, and hardening of Oracle Solaris servers
Configure and manage Automated Installer (AI) for network-based provisioning
Administer Oracle Solaris Zones (containers) to isolate application environments
Monitor system performance, including kernel tuning and resource management (ZFS, DTrace)
Implement backup strategies, including ZFS snapshots and disaster recovery procedures
2. Network Security (Sophos Firewall & Perimeter Defense)
Deploy, configure, and maintain Sophos Firewall (XG/XGS series)
Implement firewall policies, VLAN segmentation, and access control lists (ACLs)
Manage secure connectivity through Site-to-Site (IPsec/SSL) and SSL VPN
Monitor and optimize threat protection tools, including MDR, IPS, Web Filtering, and Application Control
3. EMI & Fintech Compliance
· Ensure all configurations align with Central Bank (DAB) regulations for EMI operations.
· Maintain logs for all access to financial systems; prepare for internal and external audits.
· Lead IT audit and change management processes – no unapproved changes to firewall, Solaris zones, or payment integrations.
· Manage Business Continuity (BCP) and Disaster Recovery (DR) drills with measurable targets: RTO < 1 hour, RPO < 15 minutes for transaction systems.
4. IT Operations & Management
Manage Windows/Linux servers where the application stack interfaces with Solaris.
Oversee vendor management for internet links and hardware procurement.
Lead and support the internal IT helpdesk team
5. Budget & Vendor Management (Critical addition)
· Prepare and manage the annual IT budget, including hardware, software licenses (Oracle, Sophos), and support contracts.
· Negotiate with vendors for internet links, data center services, and hardware procurement.

Job Requirements
Required Technical Skills & Competencies
Expert-level experience with Oracle Solaris, including installation, Zones, ZFS, and networking
Proficiency in Linux (RedHat/CentOS) and Windows Server environments
Strong expertise in Sophos Firewall (XG/XGS), including policy configuration, NAT, VPN, and high availability
Solid understanding of networking concepts such as VLANs, TCP/IP, and routing protocols (BGP/OSPF)
Familiarity with fintech systems and standards such as ISO 8583, 3D Secure, PCI DSS, and high-availability architectures
Experience with virtualization technologies such as Solaris Zones, VMware vSphere, or similar platforms
Experience & Qualifications
Minimum 5+ years of experience in IT infrastructure management
At least 3 years of hands-on experience with Oracle Solaris and Sophos security solutions
Prior experience in fintech, banking, or EMI environments is required
Preferred Certifications:
Oracle Certified Professional (OCP) – Solaris
Sophos Certified Architect or Engineer
CCNA, ITIL v4
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field
Personal Attributes
High level of integrity and ability to handle sensitive financial systems
Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work under pressure
Detail-oriented with a strong focus on documentation and audit readiness

Submission Guidelines
How to Apply:
Interested and qualified candidates are invited to submit their CV and cover letter (in PDF format) to jobs@aurumaf.com
Please mention the position title “IT Manager” in the subject line of your email.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

title: RAN Drive Test Engineer
description:
Role Summary
The DT Engineer is responsible for performing network drive test (DT) activities on the Radio Access Network (RAN) across multi-vendor and multi-technology 2G, 3G, and LTE sites.

Duties and Responsibilities
Network DT activities performed on the RAN covering multi-vendor/multi-technology 2G, 3G & LTE sites.
Detailed knowledge of all OEM parameter and feature sets as well as recommended settings, OEM KPI’s and counters, counters specific to measure subscriber experience, Handling Post Processing procedures/ guidelines.
Identification of KPIs relating to coverage, accessibility, mobility, integrity, and service retainability for optimization for all Radio bearers/ services including Voice and Data.
Proactively identify and escalate areas with network coverage issues, poor network services, loss of signal strength and data service faults on the network.
Customer Complaint management which includes both proactive and reactive quality improvement initiatives.
Coordinating with Optimization teams, scheduling daily, weekly, monthly, Ad-hoc activities to perform detailed DTs.
RF Coverage analysis, parameter optimizations, antenna tilt verifications and suggestions.
Periodic network motorway drive test campaigns in major metros, Ad-hoc drive testing for quality benchmarking and RAN Optimisation activities including Single Site Verification Test report for newly integrated sites of technologies.
Maintaining a parameter & customer complaint database which details all the RAN parameters under control of the Optimisation Dept.
Analyzed logs of Radio tools for identifying issues in the coverage and quality area.
Proactively identify and escalate areas with network coverage issues and faults in the network.
Collaborate with business support service teams to identify new potential sales areas.
Must have Hands-on Routine network activities.
Radio Network Topology Audit, Radio Network Parameter consistency checks
Major route drive testing, Malls, IBS/DAS, walk/drive testing.
Sign-off the performance acceptance as per agreed Quality Targets for all modernization projects.
Strong Hands-on and Knowledge of DT & Post Processing Tools (e.g., TEMS, Nemo, MapInfo, Actix, GE Tools).
OH&S/QMS Role and Responsibilities:
Reports any hazards or risks in addition to Accidents/Incident to QHSE department.
Be aware of and complies to i engineering’s IMS Policy.
Abides by i engineering’s Local Legal and Client Requirements.
Attends and engages in IMS Awareness Sessions.
Ensures that all IMS procedures are regularly followed and raises the issue when they are not

Job Requirements
Minimum 2-3 years of experience.
Must have strong telecom skills and knowledge of common programs such as Microsoft Office.
Ability to work under pressure.
Capable of professionally managing confidential information.

Submission Guidelines
Make sure to write the position title and vacancy number in the subject line of your email and send your CV along with a cover letter. Only short listed candidates will be notified.

title: Commercial Reporting Officer
description:
Role Summary
The reporting officer is responsible for ensuring the accurate collection, validation, analysis, and reporting of all commercial data across key businesses, including Top-Up, Star Pay, and Shops. The role supports strategic decision-making, performance monitoring, and continuous improvement through reliable MIS systems and actionable insights.

Duties and Responsibilities
1. Data Collection & Management
• Lead the systematic collection of data from all commercial projects, regional teams, and operational channels.
• Ensure data integrity by maintaining structured, reliable, and well-organized databases.
• Implement data validation checks to ensure accuracy, completeness, and consistency across all reporting sources.
2. Reporting & Business Analysis
• Prepare and deliver high-quality daily, weekly, and monthly reports for the Head of Commercial and senior management.
• Monitor and report KPIs, sales performance, and regional performance metrics.
• Conduct detailed data analysis to identify trends, performance gaps, and growth opportunities.
• Provide clear, actionable insights to support strategic and operational decision-making.
3. Performance Monitoring & KPI Tracking
• Track and monitor targets, and operational KPIs across Top-Up, Star Pay, and Shops projects.
• Ensure real-time visibility of performance against defined business objectives.
• Highlight underperformance or risk areas and escalate to relevant stakeholders for timely corrective action.
4. Cross-Functional Coordination & Support
• Collaborate closely with product owners, main office, and regional teams to ensure timely and accurate data flow.
• Provide standardized reporting formats, dashboards, and templates to support operations.
5. Process Improvement & Automation
• Continuously evaluate existing reporting processes and identify inefficiencies or gaps.
• Recommend and implement improvements to enhance reporting accuracy, speed, and usability.
• Drive automation initiatives to reduce manual reporting efforts and improve data reliability.
• Support system enhancements and digital transformation of MIS processes where applicable.
6. Data Governance & Documentation
• Maintain proper documentation of reporting structures, data sources, and KPI definitions.
• Ensure consistency in reporting standards across all business units.
• Support audit requirements by ensuring data traceability and historical record management.

Job Requirements
Education
• Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, Statistics, Data Science, or a related field
• A Master’s degree or relevant certifications in Data Analysis, MIS, or Business Intelligence is an advantage
Experience
• Minimum 2–4 years of experience in reporting, MIS, data analysis, or a similar role
• Experience in telecom, fintech, banking, or FMCG sectors is preferred
• Proven experience in handling large datasets, reporting systems, and performance tracking
Skills & Competencies
• Strong analytical and critical thinking skills with the ability to interpret complex data
• High attention to accuracy, detail, and data integrity
• Ability to translate data into actionable insights for business decisions
• Strong understanding of KPIs, performance tracking, and business metrics
• Excellent problem-solving and process improvement skills
• Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel (pivot tables, formulas, data analysis tools)
• Experience with BI tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau) is highly preferred
• Familiarity with databases, SQL, or data management systems is an advantage
• Experience with ERP/CRM systems and reporting dashboards
• Ability to design and maintain automated reports and dashboards

Submission Guidelines
Application Submission Guidelines
Interested and qualified national candidates are invited to click the link below and fill in the form completely. submit their applications, including a cover letter and an updated CV , no later than 10 May, 2026 to the link provided below:
Submission Form: ( https://forms.gle/WNnFXjsFKYVzEGdC6 )
Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

title: Chief Information Officer
description:
Role Summary
The Chief Information Officer (CIO) is a senior executive responsible for leading the bank’s overall information technology (IT) strategy and operations. The CIO ensures that technology systems support the bank’s strategic goals, enhance operational efficiency, and comply with regulatory requirements.
This role involves overseeing IT infrastructure, digital banking systems, cybersecurity frameworks, and data management practices. The CIO plays a critical role in driving digital transformation, improving customer experience through technology, and ensuring the security and integrity of all banking systems.
The CIO collaborates with executive management and other departments to identify technological needs, implement innovative solutions, and manage IT risks. Additionally, the role ensures business continuity, system reliability, and alignment of IT initiatives with the bank’s long-term objectives.

Duties and Responsibilities
Chief Information Officer shall develop goals, roadmap and executing a multi-year technology strategy supporting the full range of business services, and ensure the IT department runs smoothly and effectively.
Chief Information Officer shall provide vision and leadership for developing and implementing information technology initiatives and Chief Information Officer is a member of the Executive Leadership Team and directs the planning and implementation of enterprise IT systems in support of business operations in order to improve cost effectiveness and service quality,
Chief Information Officer shall direct activities of the IT Department, providing leadership and supervising of IT staff and ensures Compliance with bank’s policies and procedures as well monitor changes in the technology sector to discover ways the company can improve and develop.
Chief Information Officer is responsible for daily operations of technology and technology-related systems and in providing ongoing service to internal staff and other stakeholders, also responsible for all aspects of the organization’s information technology and systems, including information and cybersecurity.
Chief Information Officer Shall Lead IT strategic and operational planning to achieve business goals by fostering innovation, prioritizing IT initiatives, and coordinating the evaluation, deployment and management of current and future IT resources and systems across the organization.
Chief Information Officer Shall Create state of the organization dynamic security practices across the IT department and bank as well provide high quality day-to-day operations of technology and technology enabled business functions.
Chief Information Officer shall develop and maintain an appropriate IT organizational structure that supports the organization’s needs, including information and cybersecurity.
Chief Information Officer shall stay abreast of emerging technologies that can improve IT department performance and bring cost effectiveness to the company.
Chief Information Officer responsible to stay at the forefront of IT risk and security issues facing the Bank also Assess and make recommendations on the improvement or re-engineering of the IT department.
Chief Information Officer shall maintain security standards appropriate for the bank’s size and complexity and Develop, track, and control the IT annual operating and capital budgets.
Chief Information Officer shall collaborate with senior leaders to ensure technology strategy and investment are in line with business function objectives and Acting as a senior point of escalation to troubleshoot, report and resolve issues as well supervise the networks and computer systems including Core Banking applications and Databases in the company to ensure optimal performance.
Chief Information Officer shall serve as the senior technical solutions analyst and ensuring strategic technology decisions are evaluated and assessed in line with technology industry standards.
Chief Information Officer shall identify security threats, formulate strategies and methods to mitigate the threats.
Chief Information Officer Shall Plan, Direct and establish IT-related projects as well create and adapt technological platforms to improve the customer experience.
Chief Information Officer is responsible for Troubleshoot date-related issues and establish regular maintenance.
Chief Information Officer shall work with upper-level IT staff to develop and implement department goals and implementing IT policies, protocols and standards.
Chief Information officer shall Develops and implement strategies to improve the efficiency and efficacy of technologies initiatives appropriate support to company-wide goals.
Chief Information Officer is responsible to review performance of IT staff and develop their Job Descriptions.
Chief Information Officer is Responsible for the development, review and certification of all back-up and disaster recovery procedures and plans as well planning data storage and monitoring performance of databases.
Chief Information officer shall Train IT staff personnel to enhance their skills and knowledge.
Chief Information officer shall monitor and regular check-up of IT succession plan and develop succession plan for key IT positions.
Chief Information Officer shall work with upper management and senior IT staff to develop the IT department budget as well review and recommend IT department purchases and payments.
Chief Information officer shall Review Vendor proposals and makes decisions based on things such as price, what they offer, and how the vendor product may fit into the organization.
Chief Information officer shall communicate with other executives regarding costs, value and risk-potential of new IT projects.
Chief Information Officer Shall Oversees the development and testing of new programs developed specifically for the company.
Chief Information Officer Shall Ensures the company’s data remains secure by keeping up to date on the latest cyber security threats and finds ways to guard against them on an organization-wide scale.
Chief Information officer shall Coaches members of the IT teams, particularly IT leaders, so everyone stays on the same pate across the company.
Chief Information officer shall Communicates with other executive members to make sure all parts of the company use technology in the best ways possible.
To attend to any other matter that may not have been mentioned in this document but is otherwise required to be attended by the job holder. Besides, the Job Holder is to attend to any Bank related assignment given by CEO, Board of Supervisors or General Meeting of Share Holders.

Job Requirements
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science required; Master’s degree preferred.
Professional Certificates in cybersecurity, information Technology, and modern threats.
Experience:
Minimum 7-10 Year experience in managing or directing IT operation in financial institutions.
Skills:
Proven experience as chief information officer or similar managerial role.
Excellent knowledge of IT systems and infrastructure.
Background in designing/developing IT systems and planning implementation.
Solid understanding of data analysis, budgeting and business operations.
Superior analytical and problem-solving capabilities.
Strong strategic and business mindset.
Excellent organizational and leadership skills.
Outstanding communication and interpersonal abilities.
Personal Attributes:
Visionary thinker
Perseverance
Patience
Risk Taking Ability
Outgoing Personality
Service-oriented skills
Leadership Skills:
Supervisory skills
Motivational skills
Ability to take ownership
Delegation of work
Entrepreneurial skills
Staff Management Skills
Decision-Making Skills

Submission Guidelines
Please mention specific Job Title and Vacancy numbers in subject line of your E-mail otherwise your application will not be considered.
Applicants who meet the above requirements should submit their updated Curriculum vitae (CV) to email address ( sr.recruitment-officer@ghazanfarbank.com )
Applicants while applying for this position must take in CC entire Email address of ( info.bsd@dab.gov.af ) otherwise the applications will not be considered.
Applications received after the deadline will not be considered.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.

title: IT Officer NOC Engineer - Night Shift
description:
Role Summary
To serve as the frontline guardian of Setaragan Mutahed’s high-volume Airtime Top-Up infrastructure and StarPay EMI. This role ensures 24/7 availability of critical financial transactions and telecommunication links. You will monitor production systems, mitigate real-time payment failures, and ensure that overnight batch settlements and EMI reconciliations are processed without error, providing a seamless experience for thousands of agents and end-users.

Duties and Responsibilities
• Continuous Infrastructure & Transaction Monitoring: Proactively monitor core infrastructure, server health, and network links. Use approved tools to track the real-time flow of Top-Up transactions and StarPay EMI payments, identifying any latency or drops in success rates.
• L1 Incident Triage & FinTech Troubleshooting: Perform immediate first-level triage on system alarms. For payment failures or "timeout" errors, collect critical evidence (API logs, transaction IDs, screenshots) and execute approved runbooks to restore service.
• Critical Escalation Management: Act as the primary point of contact during the night shift. Escalate high-severity incidents (e.g., core database downtime, ISP link failure, or payment gateway outages) to on-call Tier-2 engineers or vendor support (MNOs/Banks) according to the strict Escalation Matrix.
• Rigorous Ticketing & Shift Handover: Document every incident in the Jira/Ticketing system with high precision. Provide a comprehensive Morning Handover Report detailing pending issues, vendor tickets, and critical status updates to the daytime operations team.
• Operational Health Checks: Conduct routine checks on server CPU/RAM, disk usage, and service statuses. Ensure all scheduled automated jobs and security backups are completed, reporting any exceptions immediately to prevent morning backlog.
• Overnight Batch & EMI Reconciliation: Verify the successful execution of overnight batch reconciliation jobs between StarPay and partner banks. Manually trigger or report failures in settlement processes to ensure financial data integrity for the next business day.
• Network & ISP Coordination: Support basic network troubleshooting (link down, packet loss) affecting agent connectivity. Coordinate directly with local ISPs and MNO partners (AWCC, Roshan, Etisalat, MTN, Salaam) to resolve connectivity issues affecting the Top-Up platform.
• Compliance & Security Adherence: Maintain absolute confidentiality of sensitive financial and customer data. Follow strict Access Control Procedures and Zero-Change Policy—do not perform unauthorized system changes or configuration updates during the shift.

Job Requirements
• Education: Bachelor’s degree or Diploma in Computer Science, Information Technology, or Software Engineering.
• Experience: 1–3 years of experience in a Network Operations Center (NOC), IT Support, or FinTech operations role. Fresh graduates with exceptional understanding of Linux/Networking and a high sense of responsibility will be considered.
• Shift Flexibility: Absolute willingness to work permanent night shifts and remain alert during quiet hours to handle sudden, time-critical emergencies.
Technical Skills
• Networking Foundations: Strong grasp of TCP/IP, DNS, VPNs, and troubleshooting tools (Ping, MTR, Traceroute, Telnet).
• Systems Knowledge: Familiarity with Windows/Linux environments, basic SQL queries (for transaction lookups), and monitoring dashboards (e.g., Zabbix, Grafana, or PRTG).
• FinTech Literacy: Understanding of API response codes (200, 404, 500) and the basic flow of a digital payment transaction.
• Documentation: High proficiency in professional English/Local language for writing technical incident logs and handover notes.
Soft Skills & Behavioral Competencies
• Crisis Management: Ability to remain calm and methodical when multiple systems trigger alarms simultaneously.
• Sense of Ownership: A "pro-active" rather than "reactive" mindset; taking responsibility for a ticket until it is resolved or officially handed over.
• Reliability: Strict punctuality and adherence to operational procedures, recognizing that StarPay’s reputation relies on 100% system uptime.
• Communication: Clear, concise communication skills to explain technical issues to both engineers and non-technical stakeholders.

Submission Guidelines
Interested and qualified national candidates are invited to click the link below and fill in the form completely. submit their applications, including a cover letter and an updated CV , no later than 05 May, 2026 to the link provided below:
Admission Link: ( https://forms.gle/jANFWERiLvYSTRwc7 )
Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

title: Mobile Application Developer (Android & iOS)
description:
Role Summary
We are seeking a skilled Mobile Application Developer responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining high quality mobile applications for both Android and iOS platforms. The role involves collaborating with product managers, designers, and backend developers to deliver scalable, secure, and user-friendly mobile solutions.

Duties and Responsibilities
⁠Design, develop, test, and maintain mobile applications for Android and iOS platforms.
⁠Collaborate with UI/UX designers to implement responsive and intuitive user interfaces.
⁠Integrate mobile applications with RESTful APIs and backend services.
⁠Ensure application performance, quality, and responsiveness.
⁠Identify and fix bugs, performance bottlenecks, and security vulnerabilities.
⁠Maintain proper documentation of application architecture and development processes.
⁠Publish and manage applications on the Google Play Store and Apple App Store.

Job Requirements
⁠Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
⁠Proven experience in mobile application development.
⁠Strong experience with at least one cross-platform framework such as:
Flutter
React Native
⁠Knowledge of Git version control and collaborative development workflows.
⁠Understanding of mobile application security and performance optimization.
Preferred Skills
Experience with state management frameworks (Redux, Provider, Bloc, etc.).
⁠Familiarity with cloud services such as AWS, Firebase, or Google Cloud.
⁠Experience integrating push notifications, maps, payment gateways, and third-party SDKs.
⁠Knowledge of Agile or Scrum development methodologies.
⁠Experience with automated testing for mobile applications.

Submission Guidelines

hr@mbt.af

title: Digital Banking Operation Manager
description:
Role Summary
The Digital Banking Operations Manager is responsible for overseeing the daily operational activities and ensuring the smooth functioning of key units within the Digital Banking Department. This includes Card Issuance and Management, Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution, Customer Service and Support, and Business & Operations. The role ensures efficient service delivery, operational excellence, compliance with regulatory requirements, and enhanced customer experience across all digital banking services.

Duties and Responsibilities
Card Issuance and Management:
Supervise the end-to-end card issuance process including debit, credit, prepaid and instant AfPay, MasterCards & VISA.
Coordinate with vendors and internal stakeholders for timely card production, delivery, and stock management.
Ensure compliance with card security standards and central bank regulations.
Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution:
Oversee daily transaction settlement and reconciliation processes with networks such as MasterCard, Visa, and AfPay.
Manage refund processing and timely resolution of customer disputes and chargebacks.
Coordinate with Finance, IT, and external partners to ensure settlement accuracy and integrity.
Customer Service and Support:
Lead the digital banking support team to provide timely and effective responses to customer inquiries and issues.
Monitor service levels and continuously improve customer support processes.
Handle escalated cases and ensure a professional and solution-oriented response.
Coordinate with the marketing to effectively and efficiently advertise the digital banking products and services to attract customers and share accurate information about the AUB digital banking products and services in social medias and website.
Leads the call center team for timely support for the digital banking services and products.
Business and Operations:
Coordinate daily business operations of the Digital Banking Department.
Implement and monitor SOPs for all operational activities.
Liaise with internal departments (IT, Risk, Compliance, Finance, etc.) for issue resolution and service enhancements.
Track KPIs and generate performance reports for senior management.
Lead accruals booking and manage digital banking operation cost and expenses.
Cross-functional Responsibilities:
Work closely with the Digital Banking Technical Manager and Deputy Head of DBD to align operations with technical developments and strategic initiatives.
Support the rollout of new digital products and services.
Ensure readiness for audits, regulatory reviews, and compliance reporting.
Reporting and Documentation:
Maintain detailed technical documentation, architecture designs, and process flows for all managed systems.
Provide regular performance, risk, and incident reports to the Deputy Head and Head of DBD.

Job Requirements
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, Finance or related field (Master’s preferred).
Experience:
Minimum of 5 years of experience in digital banking systems, with at least 2 years in a technical leadership role.
Technical Competencies:
Strong understanding of digital banking services, card operations, and payment systems.
Experience in settlement and dispute management.
Excellent problem-solving, leadership, and communication skills.
Familiarity with core banking systems and digital platforms.
Fluency in English and local languages (Dari/Pashto) is an advantage.
Knowledge of Core Banking Systems (CBS).
Other Skills:
Strong leadership and problem-solving abilities.
Excellent communication and coordination skills.
Fluency in English; knowledge of Dari and Pashto is an advantage.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates who deem themselves suitable for this vacancy can share their complete profile including (application letter, updated CV, and recent photo) electronically to below mentioned email and please indicate the vacancy number AUB/EA/VA/026-018 in the subject line of your email otherwise your application will not be considered.

title: Procurement & Operations Specialist (Remote - New Opening)
description:
About COMSIS SOLUTIONS LLC




COMSIS Solutions is a U.S.-based company located in Alexandria, Virginia. Since 2014, we have been providing advanced technology, cybersecurity, artificial intelligence, and logistics solutions. We work closely with U.S. Government agencies and ensure all our projects comply fully with FAR/DFARS regulations.

Our focus is on quality, compliance, on-time delivery, and transparency. COMSIS offers a professional and collaborative work environment that values integrity, teamwork, and growth. We provide excellent opportunities for learning, career development, and innovation.

Job Summary

We are seeking a highly motivated and independent Procurement & Operations Specialist to manage th e end-to-end procurement process for cur company. This role involves sourcing, negotiating, purchasing. vendor management, and resolving issues as they arise. You will work remotely and independently, often on-demand, to support different contracts and global supply chain need.

Duties & Responsibilities

Handle the complete procurement lifecycle from sourcing to purchasing.

Negotiate pricing, terms, and lead times with vendors and supplier.

Request and collect quotations from vendors via phone and email.

Place purchase orders and track deliveries.

Prepare and manage invoices, documentation, and compliance paperwork.

Resolve issues with vendors, logistics, or product availability.

Ensure timely procurement based on project deadlines.

Perform multitasking and versatile duties to support operations as needed.

Communicate directly with the management team regarding procurement status.

Maintain organized records of purchases, contracts, and supplier communications.

Job Requirements

Proven experience in procurement, purchasing, or vendor management.

Strong communication skills, both written and verbal.

Ability to negotiate effectively and close deals.

Must be highly independent, proactive, and able to work without supervision.

Flexible availability (not fixed to standard 9-5 hours).

Reliable laptop/computer and stable high-speed internet connection.

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

Fast learner with a problem-solving mindset.

Comfortable with remote work and taking full responsibility for tasks.

Fluent in English.

Knowledge and skills in IT to work with digital systems and toolsz.

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field is required.

title: Customer Service Agent - English Translator.
description:
About Speenkai

Speenkai is Afghanistan's first and leading BPO (Business Process Outsourcing) service company, specializing in providing comprehensive administrative and technical support to Afghan-owned companies abroad. Our mission is to empower Afghan entrepreneurs and businesses operating internationally by offering high-quality, reliable support services from our base in Afghanistan. With a team of skilled professionals, we help Afghan companies streamline their operations, enhance efficiency, and achieve success.

Job Summary

Night-Shift Job




Are you a motivated, detail-oriented professional fluent in English, and ready to grow in a dynamic environment? Speenkai, Afghanistan's first BPO service company, and Bay Master Appliance Services LLC are looking to hire experienced individuals to join our full-time night shift team as Dispatchers/Customer Service Representatives.

In this role, you will take inbound calls, set appointments for customers, and dispatch technicians efficiently. The ideal candidate will take charge of daily operations, including planning, scheduling, and managing the tech force.




PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ARE NOT FLUENT IN ENGLISH to save yourself time.







If you have strong communication skills, thrive under pressure, and are passionate about delivering exceptional support, we want to hear from you!

Duties & Responsibilities

Duties & Responsibilities

1.  Receive incoming calls from clients and setup service appointments.

2.  Receive incoming calls from technicians throughout the shift.

3.  Keep track of daily schedule and job status throughout work schedule.

4.  Respond to open email requests and inquiries via email

5.  Ability to enter tickets into the CRM 




Job Requirements

Job Requirements

·        Fluent in English and must possess excellent verbal and written skills.

•        Motivated self-starter

•        Office work experience

•        Ability to multitask in fast paced environment is crucial.

•        Capable of typing 45+ words per minute necessary

•        Customer Service skills and Conflict Resolution skills.

•        Telemarketing experience is a plus

•        Microsoft Office Products

Submission Guideline

This link will redirect you to an online assessment. There a video question at the end. If you don not answer, you application will not be accepted.




The assessment is around 50 minutes long. Find a quiet place and stable internet. Answers from Ai and cheating cold be identified and will ruin your chances to be considered.




Click on the link below, enter your email, and the assessment will be sent to your email to start.




Good Luck.

title: Database Developer
company: Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company
description:
About Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company

Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company is a trusted provider of IT solutions, software development, and digital transformation services in Afghanistan. Our mission is to empower businesses with innovative technology solutions that enhance efficiency, security, and scalability.

With a team of experienced professionals, we specialize in custom software development, enterprise solutions, cloud computing, and IT infrastructure services. We are committed to delivering cutting-edge solutions that help organizations stay competitive in the digital world.







Our Services
Software Development: Custom web and mobile applications using Laravel, React, Next.js, and more.
Enterprise IT Solutions: ERP, MIS, CRM, and custom business software.
IT Consultancy: Digital strategy, system integration, and cybersecurity.
Cloud Solutions: AWS, DigitalOcean, Laravel Forge, and cloud-based deployments.
E-Commerce Development: Scalable online store solutions with secure payment gateways.




Why Choose Us?
Expert Team: Skilled professionals with expertise in software engineering and IT solutions.
Quality & Security: Industry-standard practices ensuring high-performance and secure applications.
Client-Focused Approach: Tailored solutions that align with business needs.
Reliable Support: Ongoing maintenance and technical support for seamless operations.




Our Vision

To be a leading technology service provider in Afghanistan, driving digital innovation and business growth.




Our Mission

To develop reliable, scalable, and high-performance technology solutions that help businesses streamline their operations and achieve success.

Job Summary

We are seeking a highly skilled Laravel Developer to join our dynamic team at Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company. The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in Laravel, PHP, and modern web development technologies and will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining robust, scalable, and high-performance web applications.

This role requires a deep understanding of MVC architecture, database management, and front-end technologies. As a Laravel Developer, you will collaborate with cross-functional teams to build secure applications, integrate APIs, optimize performance, and troubleshoot technical challenges.

Duties & Responsibilities

Develop, maintain, and enhance web applications using Laravel and PHP.
Design and implement efficient database architectures using MySQL, PostgreSQL, or other relational databases.
Write clean, well-documented, and scalable RESTful APIs and integrate third-party services.
Optimize application performance, security, and scalability.
Implement authentication and authorization mechanisms such as JWT, OAuth, or Laravel Sanctum.
Work with front-end developers to integrate Vue.js, React, or Alpine.js into Laravel applications.
Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and application errors.
Utilize Git version control and follow best practices in software development workflows.
Implement automated testing (PHPUnit, Pest) and CI/CD pipelines for seamless deployment.
Maintain clear technical documentation and follow agile development methodologies.

Job Requirements

Proven experience (2+ years) as a Laravel Developer or in a similar role.
Proficiency in PHP, Laravel, MySQL, and object-oriented programming (OOP).
Strong knowledge of MVC architecture and best coding practices.
Experience in front-end technologies (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Vue.js, React, or Alpine.js).
Familiarity with Laravel Blade templating and Livewire (preferred but not mandatory).
Hands-on experience with RESTful API development and third-party API integration.
Understanding of security best practices, including data encryption and secure authentication.
Experience with queues, cron jobs, and background task processing in Laravel.
Knowledge of Git, GitHub, Bitbucket, or GitLab for version control.
Strong debugging and troubleshooting skills.
Familiarity with Agile development methodologies (Scrum, Kanban).
Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work independently or within a team.




Preferred Qualifications:
Experience with FilamentPHP, Inertia.js, or Laravel Nova.
Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, or cloud deployment (AWS, DigitalOcean, Laravel Forge).
Hands-on experience with NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Firebase, etc.).




Submission Guideline

Vacancy Number: Please mention the vacancy number in the email subject line.

CV & Previous Projects: Applicants must attach their CV and a list with links of previous projects they have worked on.

Email Submission: Send your application to hr@hushmandshahar.com before the deadline.
